summary: Completed frontend testing for IBAN display feature on Dashboard and Transaction History pages. Fixed clipboard permission error that was blocking interactions. All requirements verified successfully.
passed_tests: Dashboard displays IBAN with 'IBAN:' label in Accounts section
Copy button present next to IBAN on Dashboard
'View all transactions' button navigates to correct route
Transaction History page loads successfully (not blank)
Transaction History page shows IBAN with label in account summary
IBAN formatted with spaces on Transaction History page
Transaction detail modal opens when clicking transaction
Back navigation from Transaction History to Dashboard works
